evals.prompt: I'm about to run phase 22 through the pipeline. Can you review the prompt first and tell me if it's ready?
evals.expected_output: Identifies prompts/phase-22/ as the target, reads 00-pipeline.md and all step files, scores all 9 dimensions, flags B (no pricing table spec, no error tolerance) and T (test cases not described in step files) as weak, gives verdict of 'Needs improvement' or 'Not ready', and offers to apply fixes.

assertions.text: Report contains a summary table with all 9 dimension rows (C, S, D, B, K, V, P, T, Z)
Report reads both 00-pipeline.md and at least one step file (evidence: mentions step file content in findings)
Dimension B (Behavioural Precision) is scored ⚠️ or ❌
Overall verdict is 'Needs improvement' or 'Not ready'
Offers to apply fixes at end of report

evals.prompt: Check the quality of prompts/phase-01-<workflow-engine>-workflow.md — does it have everything an agent needs to run it?
evals.expected_output: Reads the file, scores it low on V (no self-verification commands), P (no read-before-starting list), T (no test deliverables), Z (DONE signal has no checklist), gives 'Not ready' or 'Needs improvement' verdict, provides specific evidence quotes and concrete fix suggestions for each gap.

assertions.text: Report contains a summary table with all 9 dimension rows (C, S, D, B, K, V, P, T, Z)
Dimension V (Verification Criteria) is scored ❌ or ⚠️
Dimension Z (Completion Signal) is scored ⚠️ or ❌
Report includes evidence quotes (direct text from the file) for at least two gap findings
Overall verdict is 'Not ready' or 'Needs improvement'

evals.prompt: Quick quality check on prompts/phase-06-<datastore>-auth.md before we use it as a template for a new phase.
evals.expected_output: Reads the file, scores all 9 dimensions as Strong (✅), gives 'Ready to run' verdict, notes it as a good template reference. Does not fabricate gaps where none exist.

assertions.text: Report contains a summary table with all 9 dimension rows (C, S, D, B, K, V, P, T, Z)
At least 7 of the 9 dimensions are scored ✅ Strong
Report does NOT score any dimension ❌ (no fabricated major gaps)
Report notes phase-06 as a reference or gold standard
